Welcome To Shield IAS

India's Best IAS Coaching for UPSC Civil Services Exam Preparation

Shield IAS as a seasoned coaching institute delivers high quality IAS preparation.

We firmly believe that “the true value of education is not the learning of many facts but the training of the mind to think"

About

Shield IAS is a seasoned institution in the field of UPSC Civil Services Examination and other related examinations. Our purpose is to cater to the needs of a varied set of students residing in cities, towns, and villages by helping them in reaching their right potential through a seamless window of easy learning opportunities.

Shield IAS is actually a learning community comprising of experienced educators, mentors and trainers dedicated to building respectful and responsible citizens by empowering all learners.

Read More

Why Choose Us​​​

Topic-wise Study Material

(Provided according to class lectures for faster revision)

Simplified Current Affairs Material

(“SHIELD MAGAZINE” : Up-to-Date content and drawn from all standard national and international current affairs sources; Current Affairs Monthly Test)

Personalised Classroom Mentorship

(Ideal batch sizes to promote interaction and problem solving)

Focus on Answer Writing

(Regular Assignments and Discussions)

Education Made Simple

(Easy to Understand language; comprehensive coverage; proper strategy, planning and execution)

Target Prelims and Mains Test series

(Comprising of Thematic Tests, Subject Tests, Currents Affairs FLTs, CSAT FLTs and General Studies FLTs (Pre and Mains) ; Rapid Revision Books for time bound revision)

Super Specialized

Super specialized and innovative methods of teaching for UPSC civil services exam Daily, weekly and monthly study and revision plan to track individual performance

Subject Teachers

Subject teachers are available even after class for extra guidance and help of students.

Shield Courses

NCERT
(Basic Enrichment Course)

GENERAL STUDIES (GS) Foundation Program

CIVIL SERVICES APTITUDE TEST (CSAT) Foundation Program

GENERAL STUDIES (GS) Foundation Program

ACHIEVE (Advanced Revision and Practice Program)

TEST SERIES- PRELIMS

TEST SERIES- MAINS 2024

OPTIONAL 2024

What Students Say About Shield IAS

Shield IAS is far better than other fast-emerging institutions for IAS preparation. Including infra the best things here are the quality of knowledge and best quality of teaching by helpful professors. Management people are friendly, supportive, and professional. If you really need help they will help you beyond your expectation. I recommend everyone not to believe on reviews, first experience yourself through there MONTHLY MAGAZINE, RAPID REVISION BOOKS, and Tests, etc. and most important Hindu Quiz, you will not regret at all.
Gourav SinghShield IAS Student
I know about Shield ias academy for past 8 months. Their activities are good and professional. Especially their Weekly Current affairs Questions... The questions released subject wise and the Prelims Rapid Revision module are Very useful.... Continue your service such that many aspirants will get benefit... All the best for you upcoming programs and developments... Congratulations to emerge as a one of the leading academy for Civil service coaching...
Logeswar MurugadossShield IAS Student
One of the leading Academy for IAS preparation. Services are really good e.g. teaching, management (Rahul sir) etc. They're helpful to their students. Easy to reach as Laxmi Nagar Metro Station is nearby. Study Materials are very useful. Nice place to study. fee structure is better than other institutions.. Thank you Shield IAS to make learning simpler. 👍
Rajveer ChauhanShield IAS Student
One of my old friends suggested me Shield Ias. This is near to Laxmi Nagar metro station. Genuine fees being one of the leading institutes for IAS preparation, small batch approx 50-60, good & helpful Teachers. Monthly magazine, Prelims Rapid Book, Rapid test, Hindu quiz are very helpful. Administration team is very helpful, they behave nicely and always give best . Thank you team Shield Ias.
Sana KhanShield IAS Student
My experience was really good with shield IAS, place where you can change yourself towards better things in life.. Where you can feel growth in yourself. The whole team is as your family here.. I am so grateful... That's my opinion ..☺
Rohan RaajShield IAS Student
Best place for your IAS course❤️❤️.It was a really very good experience. All the topics covered by sir is really great. Every smallest information was well explained. SHIELD Magazine content is very good. I am really thankful to Shield IAS.
Utkarsh SinghShield IAS Student
